understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to get any pushable object—either the selected controllable piece or any pushable block—to reach or exceed the target x-coordinate specified in level.target_x, winning the scenario upon success before exhausting the step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece exactly one STEP (3 pixels) in the chosen direction; if a pushable object is adjacent in that direction, it gets pushed along by one STEP. Walls and boundaries can block movement, with some potentially behaving differently for direct movement versus pushes against them, requiring observation of outcomes to fully understand; SELECT switches control to another controllable object by its id.

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_RIGHT | Player at x=0, target x=6, each right move increases x by 3, so two right moves will reach exactly 6. All directions unblocked, so move right to progress toward goal.
history.reasoning: Player at x=0, target x=6, each right move increases x by 3, so two right moves will reach exactly 6. All directions unblocked, so move right to progress toward goal.
